description_long: This is a pair of low-top, black athletic shoes featuring a lace-up design and a sleek, modern silhouette. The shoes have a matte black finish with prominent white logos on the tongue, side panels, and toe area, adding a bold contrast. The upper appears to be made of synthetic material or treated leather, while the sole is likely rubber, providing flexibility and grip. The shoes are designed for comfort and urban use, with padded collars and a streamlined shape. The laces are arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the overall build suggests durability and everyday wear. The logos and branding elements give the shoes a distinctive, stylish look suitable for streetwear or casual settings.
description: A pair of black low-top athletic shoes with white logos, lace-up closure, and a sleek, modern design. The shoes feature a matte finish and are built for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes with visible white logos on the tongue and toe area, highlighting the lace-up closure.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the white logo on the outer side panel and the overall streamlined silhouette of the shoes.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the circular white logo on the toe area and the opening of the shoes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side logo and the shoe's profile.
attribute_logo: White graphic logo on the tongue, side panel, and toe area; circular and stylized designs.
